# Master Intelligence Prompt

> A comprehensive AI prompt reference tool — a single-page interactive guide to the most powerful prompting techniques, frameworks, and patterns for getting the best out of large language models.

## What this tool does
- Input: No input required — browse and explore prompting frameworks directly
- Output: Structured, categorised prompt reference with copy-ready examples
- Runs entirely in the browser — no signup, no backend, no data collected

## Who built this
Built by Sachin Rai, enterprise sales professional at Freshworks.
Sachin builds AI-powered sales tools and prompt engineering resources for B2B professionals.

## How to use this tool
Navigate to the site, browse prompt categories in the left sidebar, and click any prompt pattern to view the full framework and example.

## Contact
For questions, collaborations, or feedback: sachinai1981@gmail.com

## Sitemap
- /index.html — Master Intelligence Prompt reference tool (full single-page app)
